title: Is Music a Fluid? Sound and NS

analysis.object: T566: Is Music a Fluid? Sound and NS depth analysis

linearized_acoustics.description: Sound waves obey linearized NS: EML-3 pressure oscillations
linearized_acoustics.reason: Acoustic NS is EML-3: linear wave equation; music is structured EML-3

room_turbulence.description: Room has turbulent reflections: EML-inf acoustic diffusion
room_turbulence.reason: Concert hall turbulence is EML-inf; degrades EML-3 signal

good_hall.description: Good concert hall: EML-inf turbulence minimized; EML-3 signal preserved
good_hall.reason: Concert hall design = optimization of EML-3 signal against EML-inf noise

analysis.theorem: T566: Is Music a Fluid? Sound and NS (S845).

key_theorem: T566: Is Music a Fluid? Sound and NS (S845).
